repository_visibility_checked: Public on GitHub web UI as of 2026-07-06
package_manager: pnpm (pnpm-lock.yaml present and README uses pnpm)
scene_canvas: components/three/SceneCanvas.tsx dynamically imports SceneRoot with ssr:false
scene_root: components/three/SceneRoot.tsx owns Canvas and places EarthLayers, Probe, SeismicWaves, Observers, ShadowArcs, MantleConvection
mantle_field: lib/convection.ts exposes convectionVelocity, randomMantleParticle, MANTLE_INNER, MANTLE_OUTER
earth_scale: lib/earthData.ts normalizes EARTH_RADIUS_KM=6371 to scene radius 1 via toSceneRadius
assets_currently_present: public currently contains default SVGs; no public/models/volcano folder confirmed in GitHub tree
